assumptions: Phase 1 stays additive: no persistent worker pool, no queue schema change, and no new external dependencies.
The Python worker will keep accepting the existing single-transcript payload for backward compatibility.
Batching will happen at the current PgBoss summarize_transcript batch boundary, after existing cache checks, so unchanged transcripts still avoid worker calls.
discovery.summary: Move the summarize_transcript spawn boundary from per transcript to the current PgBoss batch boundary, while preserving existing cache short-circuits and single-item compatibility.
non_goals: Introduce a long-lived Python worker process or process pool in phase 1.
acceptance_criteria: Error handling still behaves correctly for retryable and non-retryable worker results.
